title: Modded Recipes Plus (Vanilla Edition)
description: This is a recreation of my "Vanilla Recipes Plus" data pack, but available for the 4 most common mod loaders as a mod.
body:
# NightML's Modded Recipes Plus
(Vanilla Edition)

Have you ever wished you could get ahold of string to craft scaffolding, because you were in a bamboo forest, but didn't know how to? Well, now all you need is three bamboo, and bam(boo) - you have three string.

This mod pack adds several quality of life, vanilla-like, user-friendly crafting recipes that add to the overal feel of the game in a beneficial, yet subtle way. (That was a long sentence.) You can even craft a low-durability elytra before you go to the end.

Available for Forge, Fabric, Neoforge, and Quilt - also as a data pack, search: Vanilla Recipes Plus.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for crafts via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Updates Fairly Often (as of August 23, 2025)

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!
